import.review.title: Statement review
import.review.subtitle: Found {count} transactions to review.
import.card.title: Import card statement PDF
import.card.stepExtract: Extracting PDF text on your device…
import.card.dragPdf: Drag the PDF here or click to select
import.card.dragHint: Statement from any bank · PDF only
import.card.parsingExtractDesc: pdf.js in the browser — then we send only what's needed to the server
import.card.parsingServerDesc: Local heuristics or AI, depending on the PDF
import.card.projectedHintSuffix: will be projected automatically based on the card cycle.
import.card.error.serverProcess: Could not process this PDF on the server. Confirm GEMINI_API_KEY on Vercel, try another file, or enter purchases manually.
import.card.error.invalidFile: Invalid file. Please upload a PDF.
import.card.error.noTransactions: Could not extract transactions from the statement.
import.card.error.noKeyHint: This PDF has no selectable text (common with scanned statements). To read with AI: create an API key at aistudio.google.com; on Vercel (Settings → Environment Variables) add GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY for Production and redeploy. Use .env.local in development. Alternatively, enter transactions manually.
import.card.error.layoutHint: The PDF has text but the layout was not recognized. With GEMINI_API_KEY on Vercel (+ redeploy) AI usually resolves this; or enter manually.
import.card.error.noCardId: Could not get the card for import.

widget.radar.inflationAvg: Silent inflation alert: Your {name} subscription increased by R$ {amount}. Shall I check why?
widget.radar.inflationCatalog: Silent inflation alert: Your {name} subscription increased by R$ {amount} vs. the registered amount. Shall I check why?
widget.radar.stalePayment: Possible subscription «{name}» with no recent payment record ({days} days). Worth confirming if you still use this service, Sir.
widget.radar.staleNoCharges: Subscription «{name}» has been active for a long time with no linked entries in the analyzed period. Review or record a payment?
